title: Image Moderation Report
description: Result of `ModerationProvider.moderateImage(asset)` on a single AI-generated sprite or portrait. Three independent verdicts (NSFW, copyright/likeness, style conformance) so each can fail independently and route to a distinct UI recovery action. Returned at the boundary between Stage 5 (asset generation) and Stage 6 (pack materialize); a non-pass on any verdict blocks pack materialize.

assetId.description: Stable id of the asset under review (matches the asset id used in `assets/index.json`).
